risk_title: Refugee and Asylum Seeker Data Collection Challenges
risk_summary: The project is collecting data on refugees and asylum seekers through the Population and Housing Census (RGPH-3) and the fifth household budget survey (EDAM5-IS) with a boosted sample of migrant and refugee households. This suggests underlying displacement pressures and refugee populations that may create implementation complexities and data collection risks in a fragile context.
evidence_quote: Provisional results of thematic analyses including... Refugees and asylum seekers (Volume 14)... Between January and February 2025, INSTAD conducted the fifth household budget survey (Enquete Djiboutienne Aupres des Menages pour les Indicateurs Sociaux, EDAM5-IS), which included a boosted sample of migrant and refugee households.

risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Remains Substantial
risk_summary: The Political and Governance risk category is rated as Substantial at approval and remains Substantial in the current assessment, indicating persistent governance fragility that could affect project implementation and sustainability of institutional reforms.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance Substantial Substantial Substantial [Risk Category Rating at Approval, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 09, Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints Affecting Macroeconomic Modeling Progress
risk_summary: Progress on macroeconomic modeling deliverables remains limited, with no macro-simulation-based policy notes published and staffing constraints slowing the development of the Medium-Term Debt Strategy. These institutional capacity gaps may reflect governance fragility affecting implementation.
evidence_quote: However, progress remains limited on several key deliverables, including the Triennial Public Investment Program. As of end-July 2025, no macro-simulation-based policy notes have been published... However, progress has been slowed by staffing constraints.
